title: cactus cit sword
description: Just a little named-coded sword that makes your Netherite or Diamond sword look like a sharp cactus.
body:
I had this funny idea for a sword that’s a cactus, so I made it, and I think it turned out really nice. It’s a name-coded sword, so you have to rename a normal Diamond or Netherite sword to '**Cactus**' and it should get this custom model. Have fun! :)

**!REQUIRES MOD!:** [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)

or Optifine

![name code](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1503ff3e263907985758b34b471e0ee6a2eb631f.png)

Btw im making a version of the sword as a datapack where u can craft it so stay tuned.
